issue.message:
Library lint checks reference invalid APIs; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.compose.runtime.lint.RuntimeIssueRegistry`) which contains some references to invalid API: org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.components.KaTypeRelationChecker#isSubtypeOf$default(org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.components.KaTypeRelationChecker,org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.types.KaType,org.jetbrains.kotlin.name.ClassId,org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.components.KaSubtypingErrorTypePolicy,int,java.lang.Object): boolean (Referenced from androidx/compose/runtime/lint/ComposableFlowOperatorDetectorKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `AutoboxingStateValueProperty` `AutoboxingStateCreation` `CoroutineCreationDuringComposition` `FlowOperatorInvokedInComposition` `ComposableLambdaParameterNaming` `ComposableLambdaParameterPosition` `ComposableNaming` `StateFlowValueCalledInComposition` `CompositionLocalNaming` `FrequentlyChangingValue` `MutableCollectionMutableState` `ProduceStateDoesNotAssignValue` `RememberReturnType` `RememberInComposition` `OpaqueUnitKey` `UnrememberedMutableState`
To use this lint check, upgrade to a more recent version of the library.

Library lint checks reference invalid APIs; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.compose.ui.lint.UiIssueRegistry`) which contains some references to invalid API: org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.resolution.KaCompoundAccessCall#getCompoundOperation(): org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.resolution.KaCompoundOperation (Referenced from androidx/compose/ui/lint/SuspiciousModifierThenDetectorKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `UnnecessaryComposedModifier` `LocalContextConfigurationRead` `LocalContextGetResourceValueCall` `LocalContextResourcesRead` `ConfigurationScreenWidthHeight` `NonObservableLocale` `ModifierFactoryExtensionFunction` `ModifierFactoryReturnType` `ModifierFactoryUnreferencedReceiver` `ModifierNodeInspectableProperties` `ModifierParameter` `MultipleAwaitPointerEventScopes` `ReturnFromAwaitPointerEventScope` `SuspiciousCompositionLocalModifierRead` `SuspiciousModifierThen`
To use this lint check, upgrade to a more recent version of the library.
Expected resource of type xml
Field requires API level 29 (current min is 23): `android.net.wifi.WifiManager#WIFI_MODE_FULL_LOW_LATENCY`
Field requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.media.MediaFormat#KEY_PCM_ENCODING`
Field requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.media.MediaFormat#KEY_PCM_ENCODING`
Using `setJavaScriptEnabled` can introduce XSS vulnerabilities into your application, review carefully
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is never < 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is never < 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
The resource `R.color.echo_background` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_echo_launcher` appears to be unused
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Custom view ``TextView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
